title: pteris quadriaurita var. subquinata
intro: Pteris quadriaurita var. subquinata, also known as the Four-leaved fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pteris quadriaurita var. subquinata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antimicrobial agent to prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
